blended.narrative: Beech Mountain is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 5.7 inches of wet, heavy snow expected. Snow levels around 6,271 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 7 inches total. Models show significant disagreement — forecast uncertainty is high.
